data.title: BTCS, a US-listed company, rose 28.67%, having previously increased its holdings of ETH through revolving lending.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: BTCS, a US-listed company, rose 28.67% to $8.3, after increasing its holdings of ETH through revolving loans.
In addition, it was reported on July 16 that BTCS was included in the Russell Microcap Index.

data.title: BTCS Shares Surge Following ETH Investment
data.description: According to Odaily, shares of BTCS, a publicly traded company on the U.S. stock market, have risen by 28.67%, currently priced at $8.3. This increase follows the company's decision to expand its holdings in Ethereum (ETH) through a strategy of circular lending. Additionally, on July 16, BTCS was included in the Russell Microcap Index, further influencing its stock performance.

data.title: Bitcoin whale’s $9.6B transfer, GENIUS Act spark correction concerns
data.description:
An OG Bitcoin whale’s $9. 6 billion transfer and the stablecoin audit requirements imposed by the GENIUS Act are sparking correction concerns among some industry watchers.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-whale-9-6b-genius-act-correction-concerns?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: The initial forecast for the US one-year inflation rate in July was 4.4%, the expected rate was 5.00%, and the previous rate was 5.00%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The initial value of the US one-year inflation rate in July is 4.4%, the expected value is 5.00%, and the previous value is 5.00%. The initial value of the University of Michigan Consumer Confidence Index in July is 61.8, the expected value is 61.5, and the previous value is 60.7. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. July Inflation Rate Expectations Lower Than Anticipated
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the preliminary estimate for the U.S. one-year inflation rate in July is 4.4%, which is below the expected 5.00% and the previous value of 5.00%.

data.title: U.S. Consumer Sentiment Index Shows Slight Improvement in July
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the preliminary reading of the University of Michigan's Consumer Sentiment Index for July in the United States is 61.8. This figure surpasses the expected value of 61.5 and shows an increase from the previous reading of 60.7.

data.title: Coinbase rises 4.92% to break through $430, hitting a new all-time high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Yahoo Finance data shows that Coinbase's stock price has exceeded $430, up 4.92% today, and is now at $432.02, a record high.

data.title: Bitcoin Whale Transfers to Exchanges Surge, Approaching Yearly Highs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Glassnode has reported an acceleration in the rate at which Bitcoin whales are transferring their holdings to exchanges. The seven-day moving average is nearing 12,000 Bitcoins, marking one of the highest transfer volumes this year. This surge is comparable to the spike observed in early November 2024. Although the current figures remain below last year's peak, this trend may indicate a shift in capital or profit-taking activities.

data.title: Binance Finance, One-click Coin Purchase, Flash Exchange, Leverage Listing on Chainbase (C)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Financial Management, One-click Coin Buying, Flash Exchange Trading Platform and Leverage will be launched on Chainbase (C) according to the timeline listed below.
Binance Financial Management: C Principal Guarantee Coin Current Product will be launched on Binance Principal Guarantee Coin Platform and open for subscription at 22:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on July 18, 2025.
One-click Coin Buying & Selling: C Within one hour after Binance Spot is launched, you can buy coins and start trading with one click.
Flash Exchange Trading Platform: C Within one hour after Binance Spot is launched, users can exchange C for BTC, USDT or other tokens supported by the Flash Exchange Trading Platform, and the exchange is free of handling fees.
Binance Leverage: Coin Security Warehouse and Per-position Leverage will add C borrowable assets at 22:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on July 18, 2025, as well as C/USDT, C/USDC full position and per-position leverage trading pairs.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed company BIYA plans to acquire UpTop.Meme's parent company Starfish, enter Web3 and expects to increase profits by $15 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed BIYA announced that it has signed a strategic merger framework agreement with Dubai technology company Starfish, intending to acquire all of its equity and core assets, including the decentralized liquidity platform UpTop.Meme based on BNB Chain and its technical IP and operation team. BIYA plans to use this to complete its comprehensive transformation to encrypted digital assets and financial technology, and the merger is expected to bring about $15 million in new profits.

data.title: Trump to Sign Significant Agreement at White House
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump announced plans to sign a significant agreement at the White House. The signing is scheduled for 2:30 PM local time, which corresponds to 2:30 AM the following day in UTC+8.

data.title: Charles Schwab to Introduce Bitcoin and Ethereum Spot Trading
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Charles Schwab's CEO Rick Wurster announced plans to launch spot trading services for Bitcoin and Ethereum. This move marks a significant step for the financial services company as it expands its offerings in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: American Express CEO: Stablecoin is more like an investment tool and will not replace legal currency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News American Express CEO said that stablecoins are more like an investment tool and will not replace legal tender. (Jinshi)

data.title: Stablecoins Seen as Investment Tools, Not Currency Replacements, Says American Express CEO
data.description: According to PANews, the CEO of American Express has stated that stablecoins are more akin to investment tools rather than replacements for fiat currency. This perspective highlights the ongoing debate about the role of digital currencies in the financial ecosystem. The CEO's comments suggest that while stablecoins have gained popularity, they are not expected to supplant traditional currencies in the near future.

data.title: Trump: An important agreement will be signed at the White House at 2:30 p.m. local time (2:30 a.m. Beijing time the next day)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump: Will sign an important agreement at the White House at 2:30 pm local time (2:30 am the next day Beijing time). (Jinshi)

data.title: BNB Surpasses 760 USDT with a 5.68% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 18, 2025, 13:07 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 760 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 760.340027 USDT, with a narrowed 5.68% increase in 24 hours.

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US House Speaker Johnson: We should cut interest rates. (Jinshi)

data.title: TAO Synergies, a US-listed company, spent $10 million to purchase TAO tokens as treasury asset reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: TAO Synergies Inc. (stock code: TAOX), a US-listed company, announced that it has spent $10 million to purchase 29,899 Bittensor (TAO) tokens, adding this crypto asset focused on decentralized artificial intelligence to its treasury reserves. (The Block)
